name: Web Guards
description: Standard for guarding a region's lifecycle against a predicate: a policy attached to a region (document, route, modal, element), evaluated at a lifecycle event, whose deny-branch resolves to a member-specific outcome. The predicate is resolved by a swappable guard provider (native-first default → project override → custom plug), so swapping a policy engine leaves the guarded surface untouched. Generalizes navigation/exit guards (unsaved-state) and access control (authorization) onto one provider seam.
summary: Guard a region's lifecycle against a predicate resolved by a swappable guard provider.
tierEvidence: Frontier UI ships blocks/guard/accessControl.ts — a shipped constellation consumer of the region-lifecycle guard protocol.
